name: jinhua
description: Methodology Skill for reusable workflow signals and Skill evolution in coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Turn repeated workflow lessons into gated Skill improvements
interface.longDescription: Detect reusable workflow corrections, cluster them, and surface small gated Skill evolution proposals.
defaultPrompt: Use jinhua to crystallize a reusable workflow lesson.
Check whether this repeated correction should become a Skill rule.
Surface the smallest gated Skill evolution proposal.
